title: Fix malformed WhatsApp deep links
description: Live practitioner WhatsApp hrefs look malformed: wa.me path contains phone plus long encoded Hebrew digits, likely message text appended into the number path.
acceptance_criteria: All WhatsApp links use a valid E.164 phone path only, optional message is URL-encoded in ?text=, and sampled links open a valid WhatsApp chat URL.
close_reason: Implemented and verified: validation contract, lint, content/visual contracts, Astro check/build, Playwright QA, Oracle approval.

title: Audit deployed site against docs and original
close_reason: Reset to origin/main and completed docs/live-site audit

title: Implement accessibility toolbar requirement
description: Docs list Ally-style accessibility toolbar as a legal requirement. Live site has no accessibility toolbar and /accessibility/ 404s.
acceptance_criteria: Site exposes an accessibility statement and toolbar or approved equivalent on public pages, with keyboard-accessible controls.
close_reason: Implemented and verified: validation contract, lint, content/visual contracts, Astro check/build, Playwright QA, Oracle approval.

title: Add practitioner lead and contact forms
description: Docs require lead/matchmaking forms and per-practitioner inquiry routing. Live practitioner profiles have no forms.
acceptance_criteria: Doula and professional profile pages include working lead/contact form fields for name, email, phone, city, due date/hospital/needs as applicable, with consent checkbox and correct routing.
close_reason: Implemented and verified: validation contract, lint, content/visual contracts, Astro check/build, Playwright QA, Oracle approval.

title: Populate WhatsApp community signup page
description: Docs require WhatsApp community groups segmented by due-date/topic with signup and women-only gating. Live /community/ says no groups and has no form or WhatsApp links.
acceptance_criteria: /community/ shows real groups or signup flow, captures name/email/phone/due date where required, includes guidelines/gating copy, and exposes valid WhatsApp routing.
close_reason: Implemented and verified: validation contract, lint, content/visual contracts, Astro check/build, Playwright QA, Oracle approval.

title: Add redirects for legacy WordPress URLs
description: Legacy/spec URLs return 404 instead of redirecting: /doulas-premium/, /therapist-premium/, /pregnancy-blog/, /tribal-council/, /whatsapp-groups/, /team-shevet/, /privacy-policy/, /terms-of-use/.
acceptance_criteria: Each legacy URL returns a 301/302 or Netlify rewrite to the correct rebuilt route with no Netlify 404.
close_reason: Implemented and verified: validation contract, lint, content/visual contracts, Astro check/build, Playwright QA, Oracle approval.

title: Restore required static and legal pages
description: Live Netlify site returns Netlify 404 for required pages from docs: /team/, /welcome/, /privacy/, /terms/, /accessibility/.
acceptance_criteria: Each route returns 200, uses lang=he dir=rtl, has meaningful Hebrew content, and is reachable from site navigation or footer.
close_reason: Implemented and verified: validation contract, lint, content/visual contracts, Astro check/build, Playwright QA, Oracle approval.

title: Add missing workshop registration forms
description: Live article/workshop page /articles/body/ says to scroll down for free registration, but no registration form exists.
acceptance_criteria: Workshop/VOD pages that invite registration include working embedded form or remove the registration CTA when no signup is available.
close_reason: Implemented and verified: validation contract, lint, content/visual contracts, Astro check/build, Playwright QA, Oracle approval.

title: Complete practitioner contact channels
description: Docs require per-practitioner WhatsApp, email, phone, and Instagram where available. Live sampled directory/profile pages expose WhatsApp only; no tel/mailto links.
acceptance_criteria: Practitioner cards/profiles render available phone, email, Instagram, and WhatsApp fields without inventing missing data.
close_reason: Implemented and verified: validation contract, lint, content/visual contracts, Astro check/build, Playwright QA, Oracle approval.

title: Audit benefits category coverage
description: Docs require benefits cards filterable by pregnancy/postpartum/baby categories. Live /benefits/ baby filter shows empty state despite imported benefits content.
acceptance_criteria: Benefit categories are mapped correctly; each expected category either shows matching benefits or docs/content confirm no items should exist.
close_reason: Implemented and verified: validation contract, lint, content/visual contracts, Astro check/build, Playwright QA, Oracle approval.

title: Add missing favicon asset
description: Browser console reports /favicon.ico 404 on live site.
acceptance_criteria: favicon.ico or equivalent icons are served without 404 on the live site.
close_reason: Implemented and verified: validation contract, lint, content/visual contracts, Astro check/build, Playwright QA, Oracle approval.
